title: M4 Design: Architecture Expansion, Abilities, and GDC Preparation
response:
Feedback Summary (3 comments):

Specific Text Comments:
1. "### Abilities (broker-registered tool providers)": Are you sure these are all the tools for abilities? Please go read "C:\GitHub\ability-arcadedb"
"C:\GitHub\ability-cloud-file-manager"

2. "`agents-library` v0.9.0+": agents-library on npm is currently 0.1.0
3. "- **agent-worker**: Already has role-based startup...": When adding agent-worker's role, I want to follow agent-lead's pattern, which is agent-worker-artist, agent-worker-designer, and agent-worker-programmer. Right now, I think it's agent-artst, agent-designer, and agent-programmer.
